title: Abandoned Rig
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/afhReZEsknk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Survive in a world covered entirely by ocean, where resources can only be obtained through fishing or from wandering traders. 

This modpack includes:

- Furniture mods to decorate your apocalyptic home.
- Ocean-themed structures to explore.
- A necklace that allows you to transform into a mermaid.
- A custom-made abandoned oil rig map.
- Enhanced visual effects.

For physic ocean you can download [Physics Mod Pro](https://www.patreon.com/posts/physics-mod-pro-94143414) yourself(optional), and for shader you can use [Bliss shader physic ocean fork](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader/tree/physics_ocean).

在一個完全被海洋覆蓋的世界中生存，物資只能透過釣魚或流浪商人獲得。

這個模組包包括：

- 家具模組，讓你裝飾末日家園。
- 海洋主題的結構供你探索。
- 一條能讓你變身成人魚的項鍊。
- 一張自製的廢棄石油平台地圖。
- 更好的視覺效果。
  
對於物理海洋效果，你可以自行下載 [Physics Mod Pro](https://www.patreon.com/posts/physics-mod-pro-94143414) yourself(可選)，而對光影色器，你可以使用 [Bliss shader physic ocean fork](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader/tree/physics_ocean)。
